title: 这条 prompt 描述了从设计概念到最终实现的全过程，适合用于高端建筑设计或科技产品的营销场景，尤其是强调智能化和环保理念的产品。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 描述了从设计概念到最终实现的全过程，适合用于高端建筑设计或科技产品的营销场景，尤其是强调智能化和环保理念的产品。
prompt_original: 16:9 autonomous kinetic architecture, the heliotropic tracking mechanics of [aerospace/solar tracking array] shaping an adaptive, luxury [outdoor architectural structure], sequence from [astronomical/solar path diagrams] to [robotic kinematic wireframes] to a programmable louvre abstraction to the final architectural installation, ai to infer smart-motor integration and weather-responsive materials utilizing [material 1] and [material 2], featuring time-lapse shadow projection diagrams, [aesthetic style] aesthetic, presentation layout: solar path charts at the top, robotic hinge details in the margins, stunning photorealistic architectural render below, [lighting style].  input: [deep space network satellite dish array], [smart kinetic patio pergola], [equatorial solar trajectory mapping], [multi-axis pivoting joint schematics], [photovoltaic-coated tinted glass], [extruded matte bronze aluminum], [contemporary silicon valley billionaire estate], [golden hour sunlight casting intricate geometric shadows]
prompt_zh: 16:9 自主运动建筑，[航空航天/太阳能跟踪阵列]的向日追踪机械装置塑造了一个适应性强、豪华的[户外建筑结构]，从[天文/太阳路径图]到[机器人运动学线框]再到可编程百叶窗抽象，最终形成建筑安装。AI推断智能电机集成和使用[材料1]和[材料2]的天气响应材料，包含延时阴影投影图，采用[美学风格]美学，展示布局：顶部为太阳路径图表，边缘为机器人铰链细节，下方为令人惊叹的照片级写实建筑渲染，[照明风格]。输入：[深空网络卫星天线阵列]，[智能运动凉亭]，[赤道太阳轨迹映射]，[多轴旋转关节示意图]，[光伏涂层着色玻璃]，[挤压哑光青铜铝]，[当代硅谷亿万富翁庄园]，[黄金时段阳光投射复杂的几何阴影]
